content: Coggan 7-Zone FTP model (standard in cycling training software): Z1 Active Recovery <55% FTP, Z2 Endurance 56-75% FTP, Z3 Tempo 76-90% FTP, Z4 Threshold 91-105% FTP, Z5 VO2max 106-120% FTP, Z6 Anaerobic Capacity 121-150% FTP, Z7 Neuromuscular Power >150% FTP. Implementation: given FTP in watts, compute zone bounds as watts = Math.round(FTP * fraction). Zone detection: given watts, find first zone where watts <= upper bound. Zone 7 has no upper bound. This is a pure deterministic utility function with no external dependencies — implement as a simple TypeScript pure function in lib/training/zones.ts.
